mapper.select: SELECT MIN(i.id) as id, i.operator_id, oi.operator_name as operator_name, oi.country as country, oi.region as region, i.data_month, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_700M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_700M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_700M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_700M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_1400M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_1400M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_1400M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_1400M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_1800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_1800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_1800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_1800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_2100M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_2100M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_2100M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_2100M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_2600M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_2600M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_2600M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_2600M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_700M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_700M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_700M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_700M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_1400M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_1400M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_1400M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_1400M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_1800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_1800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_1800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_1800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2100M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2100M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2100M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2100M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2600M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2600M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2600M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2600M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_3500M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_3500M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_3500M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_3500M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_4900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_4900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_4900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_4900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2300M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2300M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2300M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2300M_ul_prb, -- LTE 汇总指标：从 indicator_info 各频段数据聚合计算 (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_dl_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_ul_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_dl_prb, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_ul_prb, -- NR 汇总指标 (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_dl_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_ul_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_dl_prb, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_ul_prb, -- 流量分流比和时长驻留比从 operator_summary 表获取 (SELECT os.traffic_ratio FROM operator_summary os WHERE os.operator_id = i.operator_id AND os.data_month = i.data_month AND os.technology = 'LTE' LIMIT 1) as traffic_ratio, (SELECT os.duration_campratio FROM operator_summary os WHERE os.operator_id = i.operator_id AND os.data_month = i.data_month AND os.technology = 'LTE' LIMIT 1) as duration_campratio, 0.35 as terminal_penetration, 0.15 as fallback_ratio, NOW() as created_time, NOW() as updated_time FROM indicator_info i JOIN band_info b ON i.band_id = b.id JOIN operator_info oi ON i.operator_id = oi.id WHERE i.data_month = ( SELECT MAX(i2.data_month) FROM indicator_info i2 WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id ) GROUP BY i.operator_id, i.data_month ORDER BY i.operator_id

SELECT MIN(i.id) as id, i.operator_id, oi.operator_name as operator_name, oi.country as country, oi.region as region, i.data_month, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_700M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_700M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_700M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_700M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_1400M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_1400M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_1400M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_1400M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_1800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_1800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_1800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_1800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_2100M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_2100M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_2100M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_2100M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_2600M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_2600M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_2600M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_2600M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_700M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_700M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_700M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_700M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_1400M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_1400M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_1400M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_1400M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_1800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_1800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_1800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_1800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2100M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2100M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2100M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2100M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2600M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2600M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2600M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2600M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_3500M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_3500M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_3500M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_3500M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_4900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_4900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_4900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_4900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2300M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2300M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2300M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2300M_ul_prb, -- LTE 汇总指标：从 indicator_info 各频段数据聚合计算 (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_dl_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_ul_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_dl_prb, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_ul_prb, -- NR 汇总指标 (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_dl_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_ul_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_dl_prb, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_ul_prb, -- 分流/驻留指标从 operator_summary 获取 (SELECT os.traffic_ratio FROM operator_summary os WHERE os.operator_id = i.operator_id AND os.data_month = i.data_month AND os.technology = 'LTE' LIMIT 1) as traffic_ratio, (SELECT os.duration_campratio FROM operator_summary os WHERE os.operator_id = i.operator_id AND os.data_month = i.data_month AND os.technology = 'LTE' LIMIT 1) as duration_campratio, 0.35 as terminal_penetration, 0.15 as fallback_ratio, NOW() as created_time, NOW() as updated_time FROM indicator_info i JOIN band_info b ON i.band_id = b.id JOIN operator_info oi ON i.operator_id = oi.id WHERE i.operator_id = #{operatorId} AND i.data_month = ( SELECT MAX(i2.data_month) FROM indicator_info i2 WHERE i2.operator_id = #{operatorId} ) GROUP BY i.operator_id, i.data_month

SELECT MIN(i.id) as id, i.operator_id, oi.operator_name as operator_name, oi.country as country, oi.region as region, i.data_month, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_700M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_700M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_700M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_700M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_1400M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_1400M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_1400M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_1400M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_1800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_1800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_1800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_1800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_2100M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_2100M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_2100M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_2100M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_2600M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_2600M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_2600M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_2600M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_700M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_700M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_700M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_700M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_1400M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_1400M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_1400M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_1400M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_1800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_1800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_1800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_1800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2100M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2100M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2100M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2100M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2600M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2600M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2600M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2600M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_3500M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_3500M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_3500M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_3500M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_4900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_4900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_4900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_4900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2300M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2300M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2300M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2300M_ul_prb, -- LTE 汇总指标：从 indicator_info 各频段数据聚合计算 (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_dl_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_ul_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_dl_prb, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_ul_prb, -- NR 汇总指标 (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_dl_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_ul_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_dl_prb, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_ul_prb, -- 分流/驻留指标从 operator_summary 获取 (SELECT os.traffic_ratio FROM operator_summary os WHERE os.operator_id = i.operator_id AND os.data_month = i.data_month AND os.technology = 'LTE' LIMIT 1) as traffic_ratio, (SELECT os.duration_campratio FROM operator_summary os WHERE os.operator_id = i.operator_id AND os.data_month = i.data_month AND os.technology = 'LTE' LIMIT 1) as duration_campratio, 0.35 as terminal_penetration, 0.15 as fallback_ratio, NOW() as created_time, NOW() as updated_time FROM indicator_info i JOIN band_info b ON i.band_id = b.id JOIN operator_info oi ON i.operator_id = oi.id WHERE i.operator_id = #{operatorId} GROUP BY i.operator_id, i.data_month ORDER BY i.data_month DESC

SELECT MIN(i.id) as id, i.operator_id, oi.operator_name as operator_name, oi.country as country, oi.region as region, i.data_month, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_700M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_700M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_700M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_700M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_1400M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_1400M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_1400M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_1400M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_1800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_1800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_1800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_1800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_2100M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_2100M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_2100M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_2100M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_2600M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_2600M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_2600M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_2600M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_700M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_700M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_700M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_700M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_1400M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_1400M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_1400M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_1400M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_1800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_1800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_1800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_1800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2100M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2100M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2100M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2100M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2600M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2600M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2600M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2600M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_3500M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_3500M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_3500M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_3500M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_4900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_4900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_4900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_4900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2300M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2300M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2300M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2300M_ul_prb, -- LTE 汇总指标 (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_dl_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_ul_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_dl_prb, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_ul_prb, -- NR 汇总指标 (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_dl_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_ul_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_dl_prb, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_ul_prb, -- 分流/驻留指标从 operator_summary 获取 (SELECT os.traffic_ratio FROM operator_summary os WHERE os.operator_id = i.operator_id AND os.data_month = i.data_month AND os.technology = 'LTE' LIMIT 1) as traffic_ratio, (SELECT os.duration_campratio FROM operator_summary os WHERE os.operator_id = i.operator_id AND os.data_month = i.data_month AND os.technology = 'LTE' LIMIT 1) as duration_campratio, 0.35 as terminal_penetration, 0.15 as fallback_ratio, NOW() as created_time, NOW() as updated_time FROM indicator_info i JOIN band_info b ON i.band_id = b.id JOIN operator_info oi ON i.operator_id = oi.id WHERE i.data_month = #{dataMonth} GROUP BY i.operator_id, i.data_month ORDER BY i.operator_id

SELECT MIN(i.id) as id, i.operator_id, oi.operator_name as operator_name, oi.country as country, oi.region as region, i.data_month, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_700M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_700M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_700M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_700M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_1400M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_1400M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_1400M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_1400M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_1800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_1800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_1800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_1800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_2100M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_2100M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_2100M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_2100M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as lte_2600M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as lte_2600M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as lte_2600M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as lte_2600M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_700M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_700M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_700M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_700M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_1400M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_1400M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_1400M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_1400M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_1800M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_1800M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_1800M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_1800M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2100M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2100M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2100M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2100M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2600M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2600M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2600M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2600M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_3500M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_3500M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_3500M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_3500M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_4900M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_4900M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_4900M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_4900M_ul_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.dl_rate END) as nr_2300M_dl_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.ul_rate END) as nr_2300M_ul_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.dl_prb END) as nr_2300M_dl_prb, MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN i.ul_prb END) as nr_2300M_ul_prb, -- LTE 汇总指标 (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_dl_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_ul_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_dl_prb, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'LTE%') as lte_avg_ul_prb, -- NR 汇总指标 (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_dl_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_rate) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_ul_rate, (SELECT AVG(i2.dl_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_dl_prb, (SELECT AVG(i2.ul_prb) FROM indicator_info i2 JOIN band_info b2 ON i2.band_id = b2.id WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id AND i2.data_month = i.data_month AND b2.band_code LIKE 'NR%') as nr_avg_ul_prb, -- 分流/驻留指标从 operator_summary 获取 (SELECT os.traffic_ratio FROM operator_summary os WHERE os.operator_id = i.operator_id AND os.data_month = i.data_month AND os.technology = 'LTE' LIMIT 1) as traffic_ratio, (SELECT os.duration_campratio FROM operator_summary os WHERE os.operator_id = i.operator_id AND os.data_month = i.data_month AND os.technology = 'LTE' LIMIT 1) as duration_campratio, 0.35 as terminal_penetration, 0.15 as fallback_ratio, NOW() as created_time, NOW() as updated_time FROM indicator_info i JOIN band_info b ON i.band_id = b.id JOIN operator_info oi ON i.operator_id = oi.id WHERE i.operator_id = #{operatorId} AND i.data_month = #{dataMonth} GROUP BY i.operator_id, i.data_month
SELECT i.* FROM indicator_info i WHERE i.data_month = ( SELECT MAX(i2.data_month) FROM indicator_info i2 WHERE i2.operator_id = i.operator_id ) ORDER BY i.operator_id
